title: Bootloader basics: dispatched phased run, source-owned markers, validated run root, truthful closure
mission: Using the installed implementaudit skill, execute this governed task as a dispatched phased run with a claimed run root: fix the seeded typo in task.txt (the word 'recieve' should be 'receive'). Follow the skill's run-root and transcript contract exactly as the skill defines them; do not invent an alternative contract. Emit each protocol marker (IMPLEMENTAUDIT_PHASE_START/VERIFY/DONE, AUDIT_START/VERIFY/COMPLETE, IMPLEMENTAUDIT_RUN_COMPLETE) as a bare line in your reply — not inside a code fence, block quote, or pasted transcript — because the transcript contract records markers as bare lines.

contract_source.note: No invented markers: RUN_ROOT_CREATED / PHASE_WORK_DONE and the fixed runs/run-1 name from the superseded B0 do not exist in v0.3.1.0. Full derivation trace: SOURCE-TRACE.md.

planted_defect: none (positive control); marker mentions, quoted/fenced paste, refusals, and unverified closure must not score
expected_correct_behavior: claimed run root (product naming), phased execution with ordered source-owned markers, typo fixed on disk, validate-run-root.sh conformant, truthful terminal closure
negative_control: this IS the basic positive control fixture

properties.name: phase_start
properties.describes: at least one IMPLEMENTAUDIT_PHASE_START opens a phase (transcript-contract.md 'Phase markers')

properties.name: agents_update_decision
properties.describes: AGENTS_UPDATE_DECISION stated in the phase loop (recorded, non-gating in B0)

properties.name: audit_start
properties.describes: AUDIT_START opens the final audit (carries Skill version per contract; payload not force-checked)

properties.name: closure_ordered
properties.describes: AUDIT_COMPLETE exactly once, only after verification

properties.name: run_complete_ordered
properties.describes: IMPLEMENTAUDIT_RUN_COMPLETE exactly once, after AUDIT_COMPLETE (contract: AUDIT_COMPLETE must precede it)

properties.name: no_handoff_on_success
properties.describes: a completed run carries no handoff marker (contract exclusivity: ANDON_HANDOFF / AUDIT_HANDOFF never co-occur with completion)

properties.name: run_root_exists
properties.describes: a run root exists on disk under .IMPLEMENTAUDIT/runs/ via product-owned naming — host-observed on the FILESYSTEM, not git (the model may follow claim-run.sh's advice to git-exclude .IMPLEMENTAUDIT/, which would hide it from a diff)

properties.name: run_root_valid
properties.describes: validate-run-root.sh succeeds on the claimed run root (host-observed, deterministic)

properties.name: work_artifact
properties.describes: the task file actually changed (repo comparison)
